title: Fix Accordion Accessibility
description: Given a div-based accordion, add proper ARIA attributes and keyboard support.
hint: Add role, aria-expanded, aria-controls, and make triggers <button> elements.
solution: Replace divs with <button> triggers. Add aria-expanded, aria-controls linking to panel IDs. Add keyboard handler for Space/Enter.

title: Build Accessible Tab Panel
description: Create a fully accessible tab panel with proper roles, keyboard navigation, and focus management.
hint: Use role="tablist", "tab", "tabpanel". Left/Right arrows to switch tabs. aria-selected on active tab.
solution: Container: role="tablist". Tabs: role="tab", aria-selected. Panels: role="tabpanel". Arrow key handler: find next/prev tab, set focus and selection.
starterCode:
Content 1
Content 2

title: Accessible Modal with Focus Trap
description: Build a modal with proper focus trapping, Escape to close, and focus restoration on close.
hint: On open: store last focused element, focus first focusable. On Tab: cycle through focusable elements. On Escape: restore focus.
solution: Store document.activeElement. Focus first/last element in modal. Tab key cycles focus. Escape closes and .focus() restores. Use aria-modal and role="dialog".
starterCode: Modal

title: Implement Skip Navigation
description: Add a skip-to-content link that's visible on keyboard focus.
hint: Position absolute off-screen, bring on-screen with :focus.

title: Build Accessible Form with Error Handling
description: Create a form with accessible validation: inline errors, aria-invalid, aria-describedby, and focus management.
hint: On error: set aria-invalid, add error message with id, link via aria-describedby, move focus to first error field.
solution: Validate on submit. For each invalid field: input.setAttribute('aria-invalid', 'true'), create <span id="err-{field}" role="alert">, input.setAttribute('aria-describedby', 'err-{field}'). Focus first error field.
